sentences.target: Ich kann dir ein Café empfehlen.

translations.de: Ich kann dir ein Café empfehlen.
translations.en: I can recommend a cafe to you.
translations.fr: Je peux te recommander un café.
translations.ko: 카페 하나 추천해 줄 수 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我可以给你推荐一家咖啡馆。
translations.yue: 我可以推介一間咖啡店畀你。
translations.he: אני יכול להמליץ לך על בית קפה.
translations.vi: Mình có thể giới thiệu cho bạn một quán cà phê.
translations.nl: Ik kan je een café aanraden.
translations.hi: मैं तुम्हें एक कैफ़े बता सकता हूँ।
translations.el: Μπορώ να σου προτείνω μια καφετέρια.
translations.nb: Jeg kan anbefale deg en kafé.
translations.id: Aku bisa merekomendasikan sebuah kafe untukmu.
translations.sv: Jag kan rekommendera ett kafé till dig.
translations.da: Jeg kan anbefale dig en café.
translations.ja: あなたにカフェをおすすめできます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative, 1st person singular; selects a bare infinitive (empfehlen).
Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular, dative; indirect object (recipient).
Indefinite article, accusative neuter singular; determiner of 'Café'.
Noun, neuter, accusative singular; direct object (theme) of 'empfehlen'.
Main lexical verb in bare infinitive; complement selected by the modal auxiliary.

sentences.target: Der Arzt möchte mir Ruhe empfehlen.

translations.de: Der Arzt möchte mir Ruhe empfehlen.
translations.en: The doctor would like to recommend rest to me.
translations.fr: Le médecin me conseille de me reposer.
translations.it: Il dottore mi consiglia di riposare.
translations.vi: Bác sĩ khuyên tôi nghỉ ngơi.
translations.nl: De dokter raadt me aan om te rusten.
translations.hu: Az orvos azt javasolja, hogy pihenjek.
translations.hi: डॉक्टर मुझे आराम करने की सलाह देते हैं।
translations.el: Ο γιατρός μου συνιστά να ξεκουραστώ.
translations.ro: Doctorul îmi recomandă să mă odihnesc.
translations.ja: 医者は私に休むように勧めています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative masculine singular; determiner of 'Arzt'.
Noun, masculine, nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, Konjunktiv II (present), 3rd person singular; expresses desire and selects an infinitive (empfehlen).
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, dative; indirect object (recipient).
Noun, feminine, accusative singular (no article); direct object (theme) of 'empfehlen'.
Main lexical verb in bare infinitive; complement of the modal auxiliary.

sentences.target: Wir wollen dir einen Film empfehlen.

translations.de: Wir wollen dir einen Film empfehlen.
translations.en: We want to recommend a movie to you.
translations.fr: On veut te recommander un film.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们想给你推荐一部电影。
translations.yue: 我哋想推介一套電影畀你。
translations.he: אנחנו רוצים להמליץ לך על סרט.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi muốn giới thiệu cho bạn một bộ phim.
translations.ar: نحن نريد أن نرشح لك فيلمًا.
translations.nl: We willen je een film aanraden.
translations.hi: हम तुम्हें एक फ़िल्म सुझाना चाहते हैं।
translations.el: Θέλουμε να σου προτείνουμε μια ταινία.
translations.nb: Vi vil anbefale deg en film.
translations.id: Kami ingin merekomendasikan sebuah film untukmu.
translations.sv: Vi vill rekommendera en film till dig.
translations.ro: Vrem să îți recomandăm un film.
translations.da: Vi vil anbefale dig en film.
translations.ja: あなたに映画をおすすめしたいです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative, 1st person plural; expresses volition and selects a bare infinitive.
Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular, dative; indirect object (recipient).
Indefinite article, accusative masculine singular; determiner of 'Film'.
Noun, masculine, accusative singular; direct object (theme) of 'empfehlen'.
Main lexical verb in bare infinitive; complement of the modal auxiliary.

sentences.target: Der Kellner kann uns die Suppe empfehlen.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ ˈkɛlnɐ kan ʊns diː ˈzʊpə ɛmˈpfeːlən/

translations.de: Der Kellner kann uns die Suppe empfehlen.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ ˈkɛlnɐ kan ʊns diː ˈzʊpə ɛmˈpfeːlən/
translations.en: The waiter can recommend the soup to us.
translations.es: El camarero puede recomendarnos la sopa.
translations.fr: Le serveur peut nous recommander la soupe.
translations.it: Il cameriere può consigliarci la zuppa.
translations.ko: 웨이터가 우리에게 수프를 추천해 줄 수 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 服务员可以给我们推荐汤。
translations.yue: 侍應可以推介湯畀我哋。
translations.pt: O garçom pode nos recomendar a sopa.
translations.he: המלצר יכול להמליץ לנו על המרק.
translations.vi: Người phục vụ có thể giới thiệu món súp cho chúng tôi.
translations.nl: De ober kan ons de soep aanraden.
translations.hu: A pincér tud ajánlani nekünk levest.
translations.hi: वेटर हमें सूप सुझा सकता है।
translations.el: Ο σερβιτόρος μπορεί να μας προτείνει τη σούπα.
translations.id: Pelayan bisa merekomendasikan sup kepada kami.
translations.sv: Servitören kan rekommendera soppan till oss.
translations.ro: Chelnerul poate să ne recomande supa.
translations.da: Tjeneren kan anbefale suppen til os.
translations.ja: ウェイターは私たちにスープをおすすめできます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative masculine singular; determiner of 'Kellner'.
Noun, masculine, nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative, 3rd person singular; expresses ability/possibility and selects a bare infinitive.
Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, dative; indirect object (recipients).
Definite article, accusative feminine singular; determiner of 'Suppe'.
Noun, feminine, accusative singular; direct object (theme) of 'empfehlen'.
Main lexical verb in bare infinitive; complement of the modal auxiliary.
